title: A problem with a case of memory inference
body:
I was [comparing Yosys against ISE and Vivado](https://github.com/rodrigomelo9/yosys-versus), using examples provided by Xilinx. There a lot of memory inference examples which works with Yosys, but one of them present a problem. I attached a zip with two examples: 
[asym_ram_tdp.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/4364233/asym_ram_tdp.zip)

* *asym_ram_tdp_read_first.v:* works and is quick analyzed.
* *asym_ram_tdp_write_first.v:* takes a very long time to reach a state where never ends.

It can be tested running:
```
yosys -Q -p "read_verilog asym_ram_tdp_write_first.v; synth -top asym_ram_tdp_write_first;"
```

It works with ISE and Vivado. The two provided files are very similar, only the read/write first feature change.
